testcase.name: test_create_lead_with_ad_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_login_countries.py:174: in test_create_lead_with_ad_id assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 422: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","country_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"name":"TEST_Lead_AdID","mobile":"9999999999","city":"Bangalore","source":"FACEBOOK","status":"NEW","ad_id":"TEST_AD_123456"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_lead_with_payment_link
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_login_countries.py:200: in test_update_lead_with_payment_link assert create_response.status_code in [200, 201] E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
